content.explanation:
**Used To — Past Habits & States:**

"Used to" = पहले करता था / करती थी (जो अब नहीं करते)

🇮🇳 मैं पहले रोज़ दौड़ता था।
🇬🇧 I **used to** run every day.

**Used to vs Simple Past:**
• Used to = regular past habit/state (NO MORE)
• Simple past = specific past event

"I used to eat fast food." ✅ (childhood habit, now changed)
"I ate fast food yesterday." ✅ (specific event)

**Negative:**
I **didn't use to** + verb (OR: I used not to)

**Question:**
**Did** you **use to** + verb?
rules: Used to + base verb (for past habits/states that no longer exist)
Same for all subjects: I/He/She/We/They used to
Negative: didn't use to / used not to + base verb
Question: Did + subject + use to + verb?
No present tense: "I use to" is wrong. Use present tense for current habits.
content.memoryTrick: **"Used to = Was used to doing"** — जो पहले था, अब नहीं। Past habit का सबसे clear indicator!

examples.hindi: मैं बचपन में रोज़ खेलता था।
examples.english: I used to play every day in childhood.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम पहले smoking करते थे?
वह पहले यहाँ नहीं रहता था।
examples.english: He didn't use to live here.

examples.hindi: यह शहर पहले बहुत शांत था।
examples.english: This city used to be very peaceful.

mistakes.why: Did के बाद base form: 'use to'

speakingTips: 'I used to...' से अपनी childhood describe करो
Compare: 'I used to eat junk food, but now I eat healthy.'
Storytelling: 'There used to be a big tree here...'

vocabulary.example: I used to have a habit of reading.
I used to play in childhood.
I formerly used to work here.
Nowadays, I go to the gym.
My lifestyle used to be different.
We used to follow this tradition.

practice.hindi: मैं पहले रोज़ morning walk जाता था।
practice.english: I used to go for a morning walk every day.
alternatives: i used to take a morning walk daily.

practice.hindi: वह बचपन में cricket खेलता था।
practice.english: He used to play cricket in childhood.
alternatives: he used to play cricket as a child.

practice.hindi: हम पहले साथ school जाते थे।
practice.english: We used to go to school together.
alternatives: we used to attend school together.

practice.hindi: वह पहले यहाँ रहती थी।
practice.english: She used to live here.
alternatives: she used to stay here.

practice.hindi: मैं पहले बहुत fast food खाता था।
practice.english: I used to eat a lot of fast food.
alternatives: i used to have a lot of fast food.

practice.hindi: वे पहले हर Sunday temple जाते थे।
practice.english: They used to go to the temple every Sunday.
alternatives: they used to visit the temple every sunday.
practice.hint: They used to + go + every Sunday

practice.hindi: मेरे दादाजी बहुत कहानियाँ सुनाते थे।
practice.english: My grandfather used to tell many stories.
alternatives: my grandfather used to narrate many tales.

practice.hindi: वह पहले बहुत shy था।
practice.english: He used to be very shy.
alternatives: he used to be quite shy.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम पहले यहाँ काम करते थे?
practice.english: Did you use to work here?
alternatives: did you used to work here?

practice.hindi: हम पहले बहुत games खेला करते थे।
practice.english: We used to play a lot of games.
alternatives: we used to play many games together.

practice.hindi: मेरी माँ रोज़ खाना बनाती थीं।
practice.english: My mother used to cook every day.
alternatives: my mom used to prepare food daily.

practice.hindi: वह college में बहुत पढ़ता था।
practice.english: He used to study a lot in college.
alternatives: he used to read a lot during college.

practice.hindi: पहले यहाँ एक बड़ा park था।
practice.english: There used to be a big park here.
alternatives: a big park used to be here.

practice.hindi: मैं पहले regular gym जाता था।
practice.english: I used to go to the gym regularly.
alternatives: i used to work out at the gym regularly.

practice.hindi: वह हर रात diary लिखती थी।
practice.english: She used to write a diary every night.
alternatives: she used to keep a diary every night.
practice.hint: She used to + write + every night

practice.hindi: हम पहले बिना internet के जीते थे।
practice.english: We used to live without the internet.
alternatives: we used to manage without the internet.

practice.hindi: क्या वह पहले बहुत गाता था?
practice.english: Did he use to sing a lot?
alternatives: did he used to sing frequently?

practice.hindi: मेरे boss पहले बहुत strict थे।
practice.english: My boss used to be very strict.
alternatives: my manager used to be very strict.

practice.hindi: हम पहले साथ lunch खाते थे।
practice.english: We used to have lunch together.
alternatives: we used to eat lunch together.
practice.hint: We used to + have lunch + together

practice.hindi: वह पहले बहुत late office आता था।
practice.english: He used to come to the office very late.
alternatives: he used to arrive at the office very late.

practice.hindi: मुझे पहले Hindi movies बहुत पसंद थीं।
practice.english: I used to like Hindi movies a lot.
alternatives: i used to love hindi films.
practice.hint: I used to + like + a lot

practice.hindi: यहाँ पहले एक school हुआ करता था।
practice.english: There used to be a school here.
alternatives: a school used to exist here.

practice.hindi: वह पहले बिल्कुल English नहीं बोल पाती थी।
practice.english: She used to not speak English at all.
alternatives: she didn't use to speak english at all.

practice.hindi: मैं पहले बहुत ज़्यादा TV देखता था।
practice.english: I used to watch too much TV.
alternatives: i used to spend a lot of time watching tv.
practice.hint: I used to + watch + too much

practice.hindi: उनका घर पहले बहुत छोटा था।
practice.english: Their house used to be very small.
alternatives: their home used to be very small.

practice.hindi: हम school में अच्छे दोस्त हुआ करते थे।
practice.english: We used to be good friends in school.
alternatives: we used to be close friends at school.

practice.hindi: वह पहले smoking करता था।
practice.english: He used to smoke.
alternatives: he used to be a smoker.

practice.hindi: मेरे पिताजी रात को कहानियाँ पढ़ते थे।
practice.english: My father used to read stories at night.
alternatives: my dad used to tell stories at bedtime.

practice.hindi: पहले यह company बहुत profitable थी।
practice.english: This company used to be very profitable.
alternatives: this company was once very profitable.

practice.hindi: क्या आप पहले यहाँ रहते थे?
practice.english: Did you use to live here?
alternatives: did you used to stay here?
